message:
feat(io_internal_abi): add NativeFileBacking enum for memory streams

Part of bd-9chy.8: foundation for native fmemopen/open_memstream.

- Add NativeFileBacking enum with Fd, MemoryFixed, MemoryGrowing variants
- Add backing field to NativeFileLocked struct
- Add new_with_backing() constructor for creating memory-backed streams
- Add fd() helper method to extract fd from Fd-backed streams

This prepares NativeFile to support memory-backed streams (fmemopen,
open_memstream, open_wmemstream) without relying on the StdioStream
registry. Full implementation to follow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
